subject: [DMAAP] Remove AAF dependency
commit_message:
[DMAAP] Remove AAF dependency

Remove DMaaP NodePorts
Update dmaap-bc postgres setup and dbc-client image used by DCAE
Use the http port of the dbcClient in the dmaapProvisioning job
Signed-off-by: efiacor <fiachra.corcoran@est.tech>
Change-Id: Ie4888b58b6f7e1405ed67625900da89e58b5cb79
Issue-ID: DMAAP-1573

Patch Set 7: Code-Review-1

After testing I detected problems in DCAE file-collector, which is related to the init job:
dcae-datafile-collector-init-dmaap-provisioning

It turns out that in the file 
https://git.onap.org/oom/tree/kubernetes/common/repositoryGenerator/values.yaml#n43
the dbcClientImage needs to be changed to:  
  dbcClientImage: onap/dmaap/dbc-client:2.0.11-latest
